app.title: USB for Software Developers: An introduction to writing userspace USB drivers
app.author: WerWolv
app.description: A tutorial on writing userspace USB drivers.
proposed_tests: Install libusb, clone repo, write and compile sample driver
Test driver functionality with sample USB devices
Verify USB bus activity with a debugger
